title: tragacantha albanica
intro: Tragacantha albanica, also known as Albanian milkvetch, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the genus Astragalus. It is native to Albania and has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Tragacantha albanica can be prepared as a herbal infusion, decoction, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional Albanian medicine to treat various health conditions.
